flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at West Chester University of Pennsylvania rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.9k → $15.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Chester University of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at West Chester University of Pennsylvania are 14% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($61.3k vs $53.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at West Chester University of Pennsylvania rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (10.4k → 11.6k).
